mapper.sql:
select ui.password , cms.user_info_user_info_id_1 , cms.care_mode_setting_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , cms.enabled , ui.username
FROM care_mode_setting cms left join user_info ui on cms.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select ui.password , cms.user_info_user_info_id_1 , cms.care_mode_setting_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , cms.enabled , ui.username
FROM care_mode_setting cms left join
user_info
ui on cms.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
